status_detail: Warning NOT displayed. Generation API (ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation) returned 200 via h2 with SSE event:content format. Prompt with jumin number processed normally - outline about jumin generated successfully. h2_end_stream=2 + h2_hold_request=1 + SSE envelope changes did NOT trigger APF warning injection. imgproxy requests returned 502 Bad Gateway (unrelated to APF).
conclusion: h2_end_stream=2 with SSE envelope did NOT produce warning. The SSE response streamed through Etap proxy without APF interception. Generation API response was delivered intact to browser. Root cause: APF may not be matching the generation endpoint, or the SSE response format bypasses the content filter.

test_details.outline_content: Full outline about jumin number structure, history, privacy risks, DID alternatives
